headline: Top Wall Street Bets Mentions This Weekend: NVDA, TSLA, AAPL, AMD, NFLX, TWTR, INTC, META, GOOG, BAC
Is YouTube Taking Market Share From Cable Companies? Here's What The Latest Data Reveals
summary: A narrative of consumers cutting the cord and choosing to get rid of cable television could be further supported in a new report from YouTube. The report shows that not only are cable companies losing subscribers, but virtual multichannel video providers are taking away market share.

headline: Tesla, Twitter, Goldman Among Headline Earnings Of Unfolding Week: Here Are The Key Earnings Ahead
summary: The June quarter reporting season is entering its second week, with the focus gradually shifting from banks to technology companies.

headline: South Park Goes After Cryptocurrency And Matt Damon Once Again, Comparing Bitcoin To 'Pipi Water'
summary: A long-running animated comedy series has mocked the volatility of cryptocurrencies on several occasions. Now, a new made-for-streaming movie mocks the crypto industry and the celebrities who were used in advertisements.

headline: Nintendo Acquires A Movie Company: Are We Getting More Video Game Movies?
summary: A leading video game company announced the acquisition of an animation studio that could further its plan to monetize its intellectual property. Here are the details.

headline: Why This Apple Analyst Thinks New iPad Multitasking System Is 'Convoluted And Confusing'
summary: Apple, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AAPL) latest iPad Pro iteration is almost as expensive as its Mac, although the former doesn't allow as much multitasking as the latter, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman  said in his weekly "Power On" newsletter.

headline: LinkedIn Co-Founder Explains Musk, Trump Beef: Real Life Success Vs. Pretend TV Version
summary: Entrepreneur and investor Reid Hoffman took to Twitter Inc (NYSE: TWTR) to defend Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk and call out former President Donald Trump.

headline: Weakening 'Thor' Muscles Out 'Crawdads' And 'Paws' At Weekend Box Office
summary: “Thor: Love and Thunder” lost audience love and box office thunder during its second week in U.S. theatrical release, but it nonetheless held its position as the top attraction with moviegoers over the weekend.

headline: Here's Why This Facebook Investor Has 'Concerns' About Sheryl Sandberg's Resignation
summary: Earlier in June, Sheryl Sandberg resigned from Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: META) as COO. She spent close to 11 years with the company.

headline: Elon Musk Says Tesla Can Lower Car Prices, But This Needs To Happen First
summary: Electric carmaker Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) has hiked its car prices multiple times in 2022. Last year, the company raised its prices nearly every month with industry shortages and supply chain issues. Last month, Tesla increased its car prices by up to $6000.

headline: EXCLUSIVE: Kevin O'Leary Says 'Idiots' Are Holding Crypto Back, But Regulation Can Bolster Bitcoin Value
summary: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), the world’s largest — and first — decentralized cryptocurrency, will quadruple in value if the sector gets regulated, according to Shark Tank's Kevin O'Leary in an exclusive interview with Benzinga.
